Class FreeBsdCentralProcessor

java.lang.Object
oshi.hardware.common.AbstractCentralProcessor
oshi.hardware.common.platform.unix.freebsd.FreeBsdCentralProcessor
All Implemented Interfaces:
CentralProcessor
public abstract class FreeBsdCentralProcessor extends AbstractCentralProcessor
Shared FreeBSD CentralProcessor logic. Subclasses provide the sysctl and native-call backends (JNA or FFM).

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface CentralProcessor

    CentralProcessor.LogicalProcessor, CentralProcessor.PhysicalProcessor, CentralProcessor.ProcessorCache, CentralProcessor.ProcessorIdentifier, CentralProcessor.TickType

    protected static String
    getProcessorIDfromDmiDecode(long processorID)
    Fetches the ProcessorID from dmidecode (if possible with root permissions), otherwise uses the values from /var/run/dmesg.boot

    • getProcessorIDfromDmiDecode

      protected static String getProcessorIDfromDmiDecode(long processorID)
      Fetches the ProcessorID from dmidecode (if possible with root permissions), otherwise uses the values from /var/run/dmesg.boot
      Parameters:
      processorID - The processorID as a long
      Returns:
      The ProcessorID string
